summaryAm: ትንሿ ቀይ ዶሮ ዘር ተክላ እንጀራ ስትጋግር ጓደኞቿ ማገዝን የሚማሩበት ታሪክ።
moralAm: ሥራን ማገዝ ምግብን እና ደስታን የበለጠ ያጣፍጣል።

source.name: Public-domain classic or folktale
source.notes: Public-domain source inspiration only. This is an original child-friendly Amharic adaptation with softened themes for ages 3-6.

pages.textAm: ትንሿ ቀይ ዶሮ በጓሮዋ ውስጥ ትንሽ የስንዴ ዘር አገኘች። ‘ይህን ብንተክል አንድ ቀን እንጀራ ይሆናል’ አለች።
pages.textEn: The little red hen found wheat seeds in the yard.
pages.illustrationPrompt: A little red hen finding wheat seeds in a sunny farmyard.

pages.textAm: ‘ማን ይረዳኛል?’ ብላ ዳክዬን፣ ውሻን እና ድመትን ጠየቀች። ጓደኞቿ ግን በመጀመሪያ መጫወት ፈለጉ።
pages.textEn: She asked her friends for help, but they wanted to play first.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The little red hen asking duck, dog, and cat for help.

pages.textAm: ዶሮዋ ዘሩን በቀስታ ተከለች። ቀን በቀን ውሃ አጠጣችው፣ አፈሩንም በፍቅር አስተካከለች።
pages.textEn: The hen planted the seeds and cared for them every day.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The little red hen watering newly planted wheat seeds.

pages.textAm: ስንዴው ትንሽ ትንሽ በቀለ። ጓደኞቿ ሲመለከቱ ‘ሥራው ብዙ ነው’ ብለው መገንዘብ ጀመሩ።
pages.textEn: The wheat began to grow, and her friends noticed the work.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Young wheat sprouting while farm friends watch thoughtfully.

pages.textAm: ‘ስንዴውን ለመሰብሰብ ማን ይረዳኛል?’ ብላ ዶሮዋ እንደገና ጠየቀች። ይህ ጊዜ ዳክዬው ‘እኔ እረዳለሁ’ አለ።
pages.textEn: This time Duck offered to help harvest the wheat.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Duck helping the little red hen gather wheat in the farmyard.

pages.textAm: ውሻው ትንሽ ጭነት ተሸከመ፣ ድመቱም ዘሮቹን በሳህን አደረገ። ሁሉም ትንሽ ትንሽ ሲረዱ ሥራው ቀለለ።
pages.textEn: Dog and Cat helped too, and the work became easier.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Dog and cat helping carry wheat and bowls for the little red hen.

pages.textAm: ከዚያ ዱቄት ለማዘጋጀት ተባበሩ። ዱቄቱ በነጭ ደመና ይመስል ነበር፣ ሁሉም በደስታ ሳቁ።
pages.textEn: They worked together to make flour.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Farm friends making flour together with the little red hen.

pages.textAm: ዶሮዋ ውሃ አከለች፣ ዳክዬው አቀላቀለ፣ ውሻውም ምድጃውን አዘጋጀ። ድመቱ ጠረጴዛውን በጥንቃቄ አጸዳ።
pages.textEn: Everyone helped prepare the bread and table.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The hen and friends preparing bread dough and a clean table.

pages.textAm: እንጀራው ሲጋገር ሽታው ጓሮውን ሞላ። ጓደኞቿ ‘ማገዝ ምግቡን የበለጠ ጣፋጭ አደረገው’ አሉ።
pages.textEn: The warm bread smell filled the yard.
pages.illustrationPrompt: Warm bread baking while farm friends smile in the cozy yard.

pages.textAm: በመጨረሻ ሁሉም እንጀራውን ተካፈሉ። ትንሿ ቀይ ዶሮም ‘ሥራን ስናጋራ ደስታውንም እናጋራለን’ ብላ ተደሰተች።
pages.textEn: At the end, everyone shared the bread and the joy.
pages.illustrationPrompt: The little red hen and farm friends sharing warm bread together.
